title: homelife for easy living 35W Swing Poise Hobby Desk Lamp - Tilt/Swivel Head - 35cm Swing Arm - Max. Height 52cm - Weighted Base with Desk Tidy - Inline Switch - L945GR- Anthracite Grey
features: SIMPLE AND STYLISH: The Swing Poise Hobby Desk Lamp has a practical yet stylish design with a Grey finish and clean, simple lines perfect not only for the bedside and side board, but for illuminating any room of the home. The Desk Lamp has a weighted based and desk tidy, a maximum height of 52cm and a 35cm swing-arm reach.

VERSATILE LAMP HEAD WITH TILT AND SWIVEL: Direct the light where you need it with the adjustable head; tilt and swivel to your desired angle. Simply adjust the stem and neck into various positions to change the height, direction and angle of the light.
35CM REACH ADJUSTABLE SWING-ARM: Adjustable and stable, the arm can reach up to 35cm away from the base, freeing up space on the desk where you are working.

EASY TO USE: Simply screw in one E14 35w max. halogen candle bulb or 9w LED bulb, plug into any UK mains socket with the AC adaptor supplied and control the light using the inline on/off switch. Bulb not included.

ALL ROUND USE: With a simple, modern design the Desk Lamp will find a use in any room of the home or office. Designed for both arm length and close up work, the Desk Lamp is perfect for hobbies, studying and reading and looks great as stylish, ambient lighting around the home.
description: The stylish HOMELIFE 35W Swing Poise Hobby Desk Lamp has an attractive grey finish and offers simple, clean lines for a modern feel perfect for any room of the home or office. Bulb not included.Designed to aid both arm length and close up work, the Desk Lamp has a versatile lamp head with tilt and swivel as well as a 35cm adjustable swing-arm.
